title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: Builder codes, testnet validators, and spot token opportunities post-points season
summary_description: Hyperliquid ecosystem deep dive: decentralization strategy, EVM testnet progress, tokenomics debate, and why spot tokens matter long-term.

key_moments.label: Points season officially over; discussion of metric shift to points per capita
Builder codes introduction: ref links or decentralization strategy?
Builder codes as first step toward multiple compliant interfaces sharing liquidity
Testnet validator progress: 23 validators, smart contract deployment live
Tokenomics debate: fixed supply, emissions, and block rewards necessity
EVM ecosystem growth required for spot tokens and builder incentives
Hyperliquid revenue model: $10M monthly vs Binance $17B annually
Social trading layer: PVP and HyperFun cabal extending perps and spot ecosystem
